# Dostoevsky

*1821 – 1881 · Russian*

Russian novelist, thinker of evil and faith: through the rebellion of Ivan Karamazov, who "returns his ticket" rather than accept a harmony bought with the tears of a single child, he presses the harshest moral objection against any justification of evil.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
